004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.SystemUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
031
032/**
033 * Serializes bean collections to Apache Parquet binary format.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Parquet is a columnar format; each bean is one row and each bean property is one column.
037 * The serializer accepts a {@link Collection}, array, or single bean at the root.
038 *
039 * <h5 class='section'>Media types:</h5>
040 * <p>
041 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c>: <bc>application/vnd.apache.parquet</bc>
042 */
043@SuppressWarnings({
044   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
045   "java:S115",  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
046   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's serializer session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
047})
048public class ParquetSerializer extends OutputStreamSerializer implements ParquetMetaProvider, RecordWritable, ArrayRecordWritable {
049
050   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
051
052   /** Default serializer. */
053   public static final ParquetSerializer DEFAULT = new ParquetSerializer(create());
054
055   /**
056    * Builder class.
057    */
058   public static class Builder extends OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<Builder> {
059
060      private static final Cache<HashKey,ParquetSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, ParquetSerializer.class).build();
061
062      private CompressionCodec compressionCodec = CompressionCodec.UNCOMPRESSED;
063      private int rowGroupSize = 128 * 1024 * 1024;
064      private int pageSize = 1024 * 1024;
065      private boolean addBeanTypesParquet = false;
066      private boolean writeDatesAsTimestamp = true;
067      private boolean emitLogicalTypes = false;
068      private boolean nativeLogicalTypes = false;
069      private ParquetCycleHandling cycleHandling = ParquetCycleHandling.NULL;
070      private int maxRecursionDepth = 5;
071      private String nullKeyString;
072
073      /**
074       * Constructor, default settings.
075       */
076      protected Builder() {
077         produces("application/vnd.apache.parquet");
078         accept("application/vnd.apache.parquet");
079         emitLogicalTypes = env("ParquetSerializer.emitLogicalTypes", false);
080         maxRecursionDepth = env("ParquetSerializer.maxRecursionDepth", 5);
081         nullKeyString = env("ParquetSerializer.nullKeyString", "<NULL>");
082      }
083
084      /**
085       * Copy constructor.
086       *
087       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
088       */
089      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
090         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
091         compressionCodec = copyFrom.compressionCodec;
092         rowGroupSize = copyFrom.rowGroupSize;
093         pageSize = copyFrom.pageSize;
094         addBeanTypesParquet = copyFrom.addBeanTypesParquet;
095         writeDatesAsTimestamp = copyFrom.writeDatesAsTimestamp;
096         emitLogicalTypes = copyFrom.emitLogicalTypes;
097         nativeLogicalTypes = copyFrom.nativeLogicalTypes;
098         cycleHandling = copyFrom.cycleHandling;
099         maxRecursionDepth = copyFrom.maxRecursionDepth;
100         nullKeyString = copyFrom.nullKeyString;
101      }
102
103      /**
104       * Copy constructor.
105       *
106       * @param copyFrom The serializer to copy from.
107       */
108      protected Builder(ParquetSerializer copyFrom) {
109         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
110         compressionCodec = copyFrom.compressionCodec;
111         rowGroupSize = copyFrom.rowGroupSize;
112         pageSize = copyFrom.pageSize;
113         addBeanTypesParquet = copyFrom.addBeanTypesParquet;
114         writeDatesAsTimestamp = copyFrom.writeDatesAsTimestamp;
115         emitLogicalTypes = copyFrom.emitLogicalTypes;
116         nativeLogicalTypes = copyFrom.nativeLogicalTypes;
117         cycleHandling = copyFrom.cycleHandling;
118         maxRecursionDepth = copyFrom.maxRecursionDepth;
119         nullKeyString = copyFrom.nullKeyString;
120      }
121
122      /**
123       * Sets the compression codec.
124       *
125       * @param value UNCOMPRESSED or GZIP.
126       * @return This object.
127       */
128      public Builder compressionCodec(CompressionCodec value) {
129         compressionCodec = value != null ? value : CompressionCodec.UNCOMPRESSED;
130         return this;
131      }
132
133      /**
134       * Sets the target row group size in bytes.
135       *
136       * @param value Size in bytes.
137       * @return This object.
138       */
139      public Builder rowGroupSize(int value) {
140         rowGroupSize = Math.max(1024, value);
141         return this;
142      }
143
144      /**
145       * Sets the target page size in bytes.
146       *
147       * @param value Size in bytes.
148       * @return This object.
149       */
150      public Builder pageSize(int value) {
151         pageSize = Math.max(1024, value);
152         return this;
153      }
154
155      /**
156       * Adds <js>_type</js> column for polymorphic beans.
157       *
158       * @param value Whether to add the column.
159       * @return This object.
160       */
161      public Builder addBeanTypesParquet(boolean value) {
162         addBeanTypesParquet = value;
163         return this;
164      }
165
166      /**
167       * Sets whether dates are written as TIMESTAMP(MILLIS).
168       *
169       * @param value If true, use INT64+TIMESTAMP_MILLIS; else use ISO 8601 string.
170       * @return This object.
171       */
172      public Builder writeDatesAsTimestamp(boolean value) {
173         writeDatesAsTimestamp = value;
174         return this;
175      }
176
177      /**
178       * Emits explicit logical-type discriminator metadata for ambiguous physical representations.
179       *
180       * <p>
181       * Disabled by default, which preserves the current Parquet wire shape (physical type plus
182       * {@code convertedType} only). Modeled on JSON's optional <js>_type</js> discriminator: when enabled,
183       * the serializer additionally writes the Parquet <c>LogicalType</c> union into the file footer for
184       * columns whose physical encoding is otherwise ambiguous.
185       *
186       * <p>
187       * First-pass scope is UUID only — the one type whose round-trip relies on the
188       * {@code FIXED_LEN_BYTE_ARRAY} physical-type signal. The legacy {@code convertedType} field is still
189       * emitted alongside the union, so readers that consume only the legacy field (including older Juneau
190       * versions) continue to work unchanged, while modern readers can route on {@code logicalType}.
191       *
192       * @param value Whether to emit logical-type discriminator metadata.
193       * @return This object.
194       */
195      public Builder emitLogicalTypes(boolean value) {
196         emitLogicalTypes = value;
197         return this;
198      }
199
200      /**
201       * Emits binary-native logical types (DECIMAL, DATE, TIME, TIMESTAMP-micros) on write instead of the
202       * default string / TIMESTAMP-millis normalization.
203       *
204       * <p>
205       * Disabled by default, which preserves the current wire shape (and lossless Juneau&#8596;Juneau
206       * round-trips).  When enabled, {@code BigDecimal} columns are written as DECIMAL with scale/precision,
207       * {@code LocalDate} as DATE, {@code LocalTime}/{@code OffsetTime} as TIME(MICROS), and date/instant
208       * temporals as TIMESTAMP(MICROS) — interoperable with parquet-mr / Spark and sub-millisecond precise.
209       * Read-side decode of these types is always on regardless of this flag.
210       *
211       * @param value Whether to emit binary-native logical types on write.
212       * @return This object.
213       */
214      public Builder nativeLogicalTypes(boolean value) {
215         nativeLogicalTypes = value;
216         return this;
217      }
218
219      /**
220       * Sets how to handle cyclic references during serialization.
221       *
222       * @param value THROW to fail with {@link SerializeException};
223       *    NULL to serialize cycles as <jk>null</jk>.
224       * @return This object.
225       */
226      public Builder cycleHandling(ParquetCycleHandling value) {
227         cycleHandling = value != null ? value : ParquetCycleHandling.NULL;
228         return this;
229      }
230
231      /**
232       * Sets the maximum expansion depth for self-referential (recursive) bean types.
233       *
234       * <p>
235       * A self-referential type (e.g. <c>class Node { String val; Node next; }</c>) is expanded into this
236       * many nested column levels so acyclic data (trees, linked lists) up to this depth round-trips
237       * losslessly instead of degrading to a {@code toString} representation (GAP-13).  Structure deeper
238       * than this is truncated to <jk>null</jk> (documented-lossy).  Larger values support deeper structures
239       * at the cost of a wider schema; the schema is expanded structurally regardless of the actual data
240       * depth, so keep this modest for recursive types with high fan-out.
241       *
242       * @param value The maximum recursion expansion depth. Values below 1 are clamped to 1.
243       * @return This object.
244       */
245      public Builder maxRecursionDepth(int value) {
246         maxRecursionDepth = Math.max(1, value);
247         return this;
248      }
249
250      /**
251       * The string used to represent <jk>null</jk> map keys in Parquet MAP key_value format.
252       *
253       * <p>
254         Parquet MAP keys are UTF8; <jk>null</jk> keys cannot be stored directly. When serializing a
255       * {@link Map} with a <jk>null</jk> key, this string is used. When parsing, a key
256       * equal to this string is restored as <jk>null</jk>.
257       *
258       * @param value The placeholder string for null keys. Default is <js>"&lt;NULL&gt;"</js>.
259       * @return This object.
260       */
261      public Builder nullKeyString(String value) {
262         nullKeyString = value == null ? "<NULL>" : value;
263         return this;
264      }
265
266      @Override /* OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<?> */
267      public Builder copy() {
268         return new Builder(this);
269      }
270
271      @Override
272      public ParquetSerializer build() {
273         return cache(CACHE).build(ParquetSerializer.class);
274      }
275
276      @Override
277      public HashKey hashKey() {
278         return HashKey.of(super.hashKey(), compressionCodec, rowGroupSize, pageSize, addBeanTypesParquet, writeDatesAsTimestamp, emitLogicalTypes, nativeLogicalTypes, cycleHandling, maxRecursionDepth, nullKeyString);
279      }
280   }
281
282   /**
283    * Creates a new builder.
284    *
285    * @return A new builder.
286    */
287   public static Builder create() {
288      return new Builder();
289   }
290
291   final CompressionCodec compressionCodec;
292   final int rowGroupSize;
293   final int pageSize;
294   final boolean addBeanTypesParquet;
295   final boolean writeDatesAsTimestamp;
296   final boolean emitLogicalTypes;
297   final boolean nativeLogicalTypes;
298   final ParquetCycleHandling cycleHandling;
299   final int maxRecursionDepth;
300   final String nullKeyString;
301
302   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,ParquetBeanPropertyMeta> parquetBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
303   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,ParquetClassMeta> parquetClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
304
305   /**
306    * Constructor.
307    *
308    * @param builder The builder.
309    */
310   public ParquetSerializer(Builder builder) {
311      super(builder);
312      compressionCodec = builder.compressionCodec;
313      rowGroupSize = builder.rowGroupSize;
314      pageSize = builder.pageSize;
315      addBeanTypesParquet = builder.addBeanTypesParquet;
316      writeDatesAsTimestamp = builder.writeDatesAsTimestamp;
317      emitLogicalTypes = builder.emitLogicalTypes;
318      nativeLogicalTypes = builder.nativeLogicalTypes;
319      cycleHandling = builder.cycleHandling;
320      maxRecursionDepth = builder.maxRecursionDepth;
321      nullKeyString = builder.nullKeyString;
322   }
323
324   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
325   public Builder copy() {
326      return new Builder(this);
327   }
328
329   @Override
330   public ParquetSerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
331      return ParquetSerializerSession.create(this);
332   }
333
334   @Override
335   public ParquetBeanPropertyMeta getParquetBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
336      return bpm == null ? ParquetBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT
337         : parquetBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new ParquetBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
338   }
339
340   @Override
341   public ParquetClassMeta getParquetClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
342      return parquetClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new ParquetClassMeta(k, this));
343   }
344
345   /**
346    * Convenience delegator for the whole-value {@link RecordWriter} using <b>default session
347    * arguments</b>.  The real implementation lives on
348    * {@link ParquetSerializerSession#serializeRecords(Object)}.
349    *
350    * @param output The output.
351    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
352    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
353    */
354   @Override /* RecordWritable */
355   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
356      return ((RecordWritable) getSession()).serializeRecords(output);
357   }
358
359   /**
360    * Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element {@link RecordWriter} using <b>default
361    * session arguments</b>.  The real implementation lives on
362    * {@link ParquetSerializerSession#serializeArrayRecords(Object)}.
363    *
364    * @param output The output.
365    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
366    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
367    */
368   @Override /* ArrayRecordWritable */
369   public RecordWriter serializeArrayRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
370      return ((ArrayRecordWritable) getSession()).serializeArrayRecords(output);
371   }
372
373   /**
374    * The Parquet record writer is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
375    *
376    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
377    */
378   @Override /* RecordWritable */
379   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
380
381   /**
382    * The Parquet array-record writer is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
383    *
384    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
385    */
386   @Override /* ArrayRecordWritable */
387   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
388}
